metadata.description: Navigate to handy.com/services/tv-mounting, enter ZIP 11201, set quantity to 1 TV, set date to next Wednesday at 10am, then click 'Get a Price'.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: Get a price quote on Handy for a TV mounting service for next Wednesday at 10am in Brooklyn (ZIP 11201) for 1 TV.
